message:
feat(core): add disk pressure monitoring with EWMA smoothing and PID correction

Introduces disk_pressure.rs, a 640-line module for adaptive
storage-ballast decisions based on filesystem free space:

- DiskPressureTier enum (Green/Yellow/Red/Critical) with configurable
  thresholds for each tier
- EWMA (exponentially weighted moving average) smoothing to prevent
  noisy filesystem metrics from causing oscillation
- PID correction term for responsive pressure tracking that considers
  rate of change, not just current level
- DiskPressureMonitor with configurable sample interval, path to
  monitor, and tier thresholds
- Portable filesystem stats via statvfs on Unix with fallback to
  df command output parsing
- Thread-safe atomic state sharing for integration with async
  storage-ballast decision loops

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
